metaTitle: Custom Table Headers — Colors, Styles, and Types | Tablesmit
metaDescription: Set custom header colors, header definitions, and column types. Make your table look exactly the way your document requires. Free, no signup.
heroHeadline: Headers that work as hard as your data.
heroSubtext: Set custom colors, choose header positions, and define column types. Your header row should communicate structure — not just label columns.

benefits.heading: Custom header colours
benefits.body: Choose any colour for your header background from the palette, or set both header colour and content colour independently. The entire header row updates instantly.

benefits.heading: Flexible header positions
benefits.body: Set a header row, a header column, or both. Tablesmit handles the visual distinction automatically with the colour and style you choose.

benefits.heading: Column types
benefits.body: Format each column as Text, Number, Currency, Percentage, or Date. Every cell in the column inherits the type — consistent formatting without manual effort.

benefits.heading: Theme system
benefits.body: Six built-in themes — Default, Minimal, Dark Header, Striped, Academic, Monochrome — apply a complete visual style including header colour in one click.

steps.heading: Set header position
steps.body: In the Header Definitions panel, choose first row, first column, or both. Your selection becomes the header area.

steps.heading: Choose a colour
steps.body: Select from the colour palette in the sidebar, or click a theme to apply a complete colour scheme instantly.

steps.heading: Set column types
steps.body: Click the column type dropdown for each column — Text, Number, Currency, Percentage, or Date. The entire column formats to match.

useCases: Matching a table's header colour to a brand colour palette for a report
Applying the Academic theme for a research table in a journal submission style
Setting Number and Currency column types for a pricing or financial table
Using a dark header on a light-background document for visual hierarchy
